mapper.select:
select bco.business_card_ocr_id , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , bco.card_image_resource_key , bco.ocr_result ,card_image.resource_id as card_image_resource_id ,card_image.resource_name as card_image_resource_name ,card_image.resource_path as card_image_resource_path ,card_image.related_table_name as card_image_related_table_name ,card_image.related_table_key as card_image_related_table_key ,card_image.relate_table_column_name as card_image_relate_table_column_name FROM business_card_ocr bco left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='business_card_ocr' and relate_table_column_name='card_image' ) as card_image on card_image.related_table_key=bco.business_card_ocr_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select bco.business_card_ocr_id , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , bco.card_image_resource_key , bco.ocr_result ,card_image.resource_id as card_image_resource_id ,card_image.resource_name as card_image_resource_name ,card_image.resource_path as card_image_resource_path ,card_image.related_table_name as card_image_related_table_name ,card_image.related_table_key as card_image_related_table_key ,card_image.relate_table_column_name as card_image_relate_table_column_name FROM business_card_ocr bco left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='business_card_ocr' and relate_table_column_name='card_image' ) as card_image on card_image.related_table_key=bco.business_card_ocr_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select bco.business_card_ocr_id , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , bco.card_image_resource_key , bco.ocr_result ,card_image.resource_id as card_image_resource_id ,card_image.resource_name as card_image_resource_name ,card_image.resource_path as card_image_resource_path ,card_image.related_table_name as card_image_related_table_name ,card_image.related_table_key as card_image_related_table_key ,card_image.relate_table_column_name as card_image_relate_table_column_name FROM business_card_ocr bco left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='business_card_ocr' and relate_table_column_name='card_image' ) as card_image on card_image.related_table_key=bco.business_card_ocr_id
where bco.business_card_ocr_id = #{id}
